etymology.description: Semantic: 彳(彳) (chì, "road") + Phonetic: 惪(惪) (dé, "virtue") -> 㥁 (variant of 德)
etymology.interpretation: The character 㥁 is a variant form of 德(德) (dé, "virtue"), sharing its phono-semantic compound structure. 彳(彳) (chì, "road") signifies progression or conduct, while 惪(惪) (dé, "virtue") provides the phonetic element, linking the character to the notion of moral conduct or virtue.
